86: To adjust the brightness of your estate hall or private chambers' lighting, open the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Housing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> menu while inside and select <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Adjust Lighting<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

To adjust the brightness of your estate hall or private chambers' lighting, open the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Housing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> menu while inside and select <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Interior Settings<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
